# SYNKN - Innovative Digital Tools &amp; Custom Software Solutions

> SYNKN is a development hub dedicated to creating innovative websites and powerful digital tools designed to simplify daily life and streamline business workflows. Our product ecosystem features utilities like Battery Alarm (a mobile utility maximizing battery longevity) and SyncZone (a browser-based timezone meeting coordinator for global teams). We provide custom mobile and web application development services and welcome project collaborations or partnerships via our contact channel.

## Core Platforms

- [SYNKN - Innovative Digital Tools &amp; Custom Software Solutions](https://synkn.app/): SYNKN is a development hub dedicated to creating innovative websites and powerful digital tools designed to simplify daily life and streamline business workflows. Our product ecosystem features utilities like Battery Alarm (a mobile utility maximizing battery longevity) and SyncZone (a browser-based timezone meeting coordinator for global teams). We provide custom mobile and web application development services and welcome project collaborations or partnerships via our contact channel.


## Mobile apps Portfolio & Assets   
- [Battery Alarm](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=app.synkn.battery_alarm): Mobile utility application designed to maximize device battery health and lifespan. Features customizable upper and lower charging thresholds (e.g., 20–80% range) with real-time sound notifications to prevent overcharging, heat damage, chemical degradation, and deep discharge stress. Includes a direct Google Play Store deployment pathway.   
- [FocusDesk Ambient Productivity Companion](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=app.synkn.focus_desk): An elegant ambient workspace application designed to keep screens awake as a dedicated desktop hardware companion. Features a modular day planner engine supporting structured recurring hourly and weekly slot schedules, integrated twin dual Pomodoro and stopwatch trackers, low-light overnight sleep glow templates with circadian-friendly warmth, and granular group alarm audio loops mapping customizable audio assets to specialized task intervals.


## All Website Pages 
- [Battery Alarm](https://synkn.app/battery-alarm/): Mobile utility application designed to maximize device battery health and lifespan. Features customizable upper and lower charging thresholds (e.g., 20–80% range) with real-time sound notifications to prevent overcharging, heat damage, chemical degradation, and deep discharge stress. Includes a direct Google Play Store deployment pathway. 
- [Battery Alarm Privacy Policy](https://synkn.app/battery-alarm/privacy-policy/): Battery Alarm Privacy Policy 
- [Contact Us](https://synkn.app/contact-us/): Innovative Digital Tools &amp; Custom Software Solutions 
- [FocusDesk Ambient Productivity Companion](https://synkn.app/focus-desk/): An elegant ambient workspace application designed to keep screens awake as a dedicated desktop hardware companion. Features a modular day planner engine supporting structured recurring hourly and weekly slot schedules, integrated twin dual Pomodoro and stopwatch trackers, low-light overnight sleep glow templates with circadian-friendly warmth, and granular group alarm audio loops mapping customizable audio assets to specialized task intervals. 
- [FocusDesk Privacy Policy](https://synkn.app/focus-desk/privacy-policy/): Innovative Digital Tools &amp; Custom Software Solutions 
- [SyncZone Timezone Meeting Coordinator](https://synkn.app/sync-zone/): A client-side meeting coordination workspace architected specifically for cross-border project managers and business development professionals. Operating entirely within the browser with zero server dependencies, it provides an interactive 24-hour timeline slider to calculate peak availability overlap across multiple timezones. Features include a global client directory linked directly to local timezone hooks, pre-calculated target meeting cards with action item checklists, system calendar integration (.ics exports), and secure backup management via standalone local JSON states.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://synkn.app/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap outlining all public pages and content paths.
- [Web App Manifest](https://synkn.app/manifest.json): JSON manifest defining web app metadata, icon assets, and PWA configurations.
- [Robots.txt](https://synkn.app/robots.txt): Crawler access directives and indexing rules for search engines.
